title: axprobe workspace config
description: The workspace file .axprobe/config.yaml — how to install/run the product under test, shared by every scenario in the same .axprobe/ directory. Authored once per target. Public, versioned interface.

box.description: The disposable environment and how to get the tool under test into it.

image.description: Container image for the box, e.g. ubuntu:24.04.

setup.description: Commands to install the tool under test. A failing step aborts the run.

credentials.description: Credentials shared across scenarios. A scenario may add or override by name. See the scenario schema for the credential shape.
